global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a blue background and promotional text.

elements.label: Blue background with shapes
elements.description: A solid blue background featuring a faint outline of a circle and a rectangle in the center.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: The logo of CloudRoute displayed prominently at the top, featuring a modern font and a clean design.

elements.label: Main visual element
elements.description: A large, abstract shape that combines a circle and a rectangle, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Fly smarter' positioned below the main visual element.

elements.label: Special fares message
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message that reads 'Special fares today', conveying urgency.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in a contrasting color, inviting action.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, eye-catching badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, bright letters.

embedding_texts.global_text: CloudRoute, travel, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, promoting special fares.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main visual is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CloudRoute, Fly smarter, Special fares today, Watch now, SALE
